purpose: Phase implementation-group verdicts generated after grouped implementation batches. Use this as a bounded group-repair queue before the normal phase coverage gate.

repairPolicy.blockedMeans: explicit blocker/fallback decision exists; do not loop on this group before phase gate
repairPolicy.completeMeans: linked source/platform authority rows have enough behavior, parity, endpoint, and evidence data

groups.title: Architecture risk: broad target endpoints
reasons: app-src-main-java-com-example-foodike-presentation-home-ef0657c4ea-005-screen-lifecycle-entry-point-initializat: implemented with behavior, parity, endpoint, and verification evidence
app-src-main-java-com-example-foodike-presentation-home-5415bc8d6b-006-observable-state-viewmodel-flow-livedata: implemented with behavior, parity, endpoint, and verification evidence
requiredBehaviors: The HarmonyOS bootstrap route host performs the same page-entry initialization by calling renderHomeRoute with current route-owned search/filter state and a freshly loaded HomePageState whenever the home route becomes active.

The HarmonyOS route preserves the same observable behavior split: bootstrap-page @State fields update home search/filter immediately, and renderHomeRoute receives repository-backed HomePageState plus those live route-owned values on each re-render.
acceptanceEvidence: Replace broad endpoints with precise target functions, types, resources, or tests before closing the group.
riskHints: current evidence uses broad shell/root/whole-file endpoints

requiredBehaviors: RestaurantCard formats the rating-count badge through getCustomerInfo, preserving the source threshold ordering for customer-count display inside each card.
RestaurantCard renders the restaurant hero image and rating star icon as part of the list card presentation.
Source review found no runtime permission request or protected API access in RestaurantCard; the composable only formats and displays restaurant card content.
SearchBar presents a single-line search input with a visible "Search" placeholder and leading search icon, updating the current query text on every input change.
Source review found no bitmap, preview, gallery, EXIF, or zoom behavior in SearchBar; the composable only shows a search text field with a leading icon.
SearchBar owns a remembered text state and updates it immediately through onValueChange so the visible query text recomposes in place as the user types.
Source review found no runtime permission request, permission callback, or protected API access in SearchBar; the composable only owns a remembered search text field and leading icon.
Source review found no settings/preferences persistence, option toggles, or configuration state in SearchBar; the composable only remembers the current text field value for the visible search input.
acceptanceEvidence: Closed critical/high features must record sourceBehavior, targetBehavior, parityLevel, targetEndpoints, and verificationEvidence.
Build pass alone is not per-feature verification.
Referenced target tests are not strong evidence until a latest test gate PASS or explicit harness blocker is recorded.
riskHints: critical/high behavior cannot close on build pass alone

groups.title: Source behavior: presentation/home
reasons: app-src-main-java-com-example-foodike-presentation-home-085460c333-001-image-viewing-bitmap-exif-handling-zoom: implemented with behavior, parity, endpoint, and verification evidence
app-src-main-java-com-example-foodike-presentation-home-75e43540b7-002-intent-uri-bundle-deeplink-or-cross-scre: implemented with behavior, parity, endpoint, and verification evidence

requiredBehaviors: Home shows image-backed discovery content across ads, recommended categories, favourite restaurants, and the main restaurant list.
HomeScreen sends the tapped restaurant through a cross-screen selection command that stores the restaurant in session state before navigating to the detail route.
HomeScreen exposes home-specific navigation actions through the top section profile entry and restaurant-card/favourite selection actions that transition into profile or detail flows.
HomeScreen observes view-model state for loaded ads, food items, liked restaurants, and restaurant list, while local screen state updates search/filter controls immediately in place.
Source review found no runtime permission request or protected API access in HomeScreen; the screen only composes repository-backed discovery sections and navigation callbacks.
Home enters with route-owned initialization that immediately composes discovery content and binds the current view-model state when the screen is shown.
acceptanceEvidence: Closed critical/high features must record sourceBehavior, targetBehavior, parityLevel, targetEndpoints, and verificationEvidence.
Build pass alone is not per-feature verification.
Referenced target tests are not strong evidence until a latest test gate PASS or explicit harness blocker is recorded.
Replace root/shell/whole-file endpoints with precise target functions, types, resource files, or tests before closure.
riskHints: critical/high behavior cannot close on build pass alone
